hooks.command: cd "D:\Все\Рабочи стол\LevelUp Academy" && python -c "import re,sys;sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8');c=open(sys.argv[1],'r',encoding='utf-8').read();m=re.search(r'git(\s+\S+)*\s+push ',c);print('PUSH' if m else 'NO')" 2>/dev/null && (cd "D:\Все\Рабочи стол\LevelUp Academy" && python scripts/update-done.py && git add done.md && git commit -m 'chore: auto-update done.md' --no-verify 2>/dev/null && git push 2>/dev/null) || true
